description: Add iframe fallback to setLocalStorage and removeLocalStorage for apps that delete window.localStorage (e.g., Discord). Currently getLocalStorage and findLocalStorageEntry have an iframe fallback for this scenario, but the write/remove functions do not, causing silent data loss.

userStories.title: Add iframe fallback to setLocalStorage and removeLocalStorage
userStories.description: Add the same iframe fallback pattern used by getLocalStorage to setLocalStorage and removeLocalStorage so that writes and removes work on apps like Discord that delete window.localStorage from the global scope.
acceptanceCriteria: setLocalStorage writes to storage via iframe when window.localStorage is undefined
removeLocalStorage removes from storage via iframe when window.localStorage is undefined
setLocalStorage still logs a warning if the iframe fallback itself throws
removeLocalStorage still logs a warning if the iframe fallback itself throws
Existing behavior is preserved when window.localStorage is available (no iframe created)
Existing behavior is preserved when window.localStorage getter throws SecurityError (returns early, no iframe)
Unit tests cover the iframe fallback path for both setLocalStorage and removeLocalStorage
Unit test verifies round-trip: setLocalStorage via iframe fallback followed by getLocalStorage via iframe fallback returns the written value
